mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020301_03-01_1#SQL001 */ A.DECLINE_RATE_KBN , A.BUTEN_CODE , A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER , A.TOUSHIN_KYOUKAI_CODE , A.BASE_DATE_TO , A.TOUSHIN_BRAND_NAME , A.BASE_PRICE_TO , A.ZENJITSU_HI , A.DECLINE_RATE , B.NAME_KANJI , A.STATUS_KBN , A.METHODS_KBN , A.OTHER_CONTENTS_KBN , A.OTHER_DETAILS , A.CUSTOMER_SUPPORT_DATE FROM TOUSHIN_BASE_PRICE_CHANGE A LEFT OUTER JOIN MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO B ON A.BUTEN_CODE = B.BUTEN_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = B.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND A.BROKER_CODE = B.BROKER_CODE WHERE A.DECLINE_RATE_KBN = #{req.declineRateKbn} AND A.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND A.TOUSHIN_KYOUKAI_CODE = #{req.investmentTrustAssociationCode} AND A.BASE_DATE_TO = TO_DATE(#{req.standardDateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.update:
UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB020301_03-01_1#SQL002 */ TOUSHIN_BASE_PRICE_CHANGE SET
STATUS_KBN = '1',
STATUS_KBN = '2',
METHODS_KBN = #{req.responseMethodClassification}, OTHER_CONTENTS_KBN = #{req.otherContentsClassification}, OTHER_DETAILS = #{req.otherDetail}, CUSTOMER_SUPPORT_DATE = TO_DATE(#{req.customerResponseDate}, 'YYYY/MM/DD'),
COMPLETION_CONFIRMATION_DATE = TO_DATE(#{req.responseFinishConfirmDate}, 'YYYY/MM/DD'),
UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, UPDATE_BY = #{req.updateUser} WHERE DECLINE_RATE_KBN = #{req.declineRateKbn} AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND TOUSHIN_KYOUKAI_CODE = #{req.investmentTrustAssociationCode} AND BASE_DATE_TO = TO_DATE(#{req.standardDateTo}, 'YYYY/MM/DD')
